properties.legend_symbol: SV plochy stabilizovane / source-raster residual candidate
properties.note: Single Polygon residual candidate generated from source-style raster mask, not from invalid make_valid multipolygon. Upper/middle SV STAV residual around P2/01/Z11.

properties.legend_symbol: SV plochy stabilizovane / source-raster residual candidate
properties.note: Single Polygon residual candidate generated from source-style raster mask, not from invalid make_valid multipolygon. Lower SV STAV residual below Z11; replaces incorrect second part of former FID111 MultiPolygon.

field_model.TYPE: STAV or NAVRH; ZMEN always NAVRH
field_model.text_id: Visible label text id rendered as optional map labels; split into one feature per visible label when boundary evidence exists.
field_model.FID: Sequential feature identifier; first property/first display column.
field_model.label_rendering: Preview has Show labels checkbox. Labels are drawn above polygons.
field_model.ZMEN: ZMEN has no fill color. TYPE is NAVRH. Use visible dotted/no-fill boundary topology and text_id; do not inherit/copy RZVP fill polygons without boundary evidence.
field_model.preview_plan_render: V7 embeds the 200dpi PDF render directly in the standalone HTML as a base64 data URI, so the Plan layer is visible when opened outside the ZIP folder.
field_model.preview_validation: V9 preview renders validation hatching only for TYPE=NAVRH features within the active LAYER/CLASS/TYPE filter. STAV features are never hatched.
field_model.coverage_assurance: Coverage is checked by comparing generated polygons to the eligible source/vector definition: source candidate regions by class/type are overlaid with the generated feature set; missing residuals and overcoverage above tolerance must fail validation and be reviewed.

known_corrections.reason: V3 dissolved same-fill BI NAVRH geometry and ignored internal dotted boundary, so two visible labels Z08 and Z10 became one feature.
known_corrections.result: RZVP.BI NAVRH and derived ZMEN.Z NAVRH now each have separate text_id=Z08 and text_id=Z10 features.
known_corrections.production_rule: Do not rely only on fill style dissolve; use boundary-line topology and label assignment.

known_corrections.reason: FID 70 used same-fill SV dissolve and wrongly swallowed stable SV area plus both P2/01 and Z11. FID 103/104 copied that bad geometry into ZMEN although ZMEN has no fill color.
known_corrections.result: P2/01 and Z11 are split into separate RZVP.SV NAVRH polygons; ZMEN.P P2/01 and ZMEN.Z Z11 use no-fill boundary geometry with TYPE=NAVRH.
known_corrections.production_rule: RZVP NAVRH must be extracted from change hatch/boundary topology; ZMEN must be extracted from no-fill boundary/text_id topology, never from fill color.

known_corrections.reason: V5 still used inaccurate hand-shaped P2/01 and Z11 geometry and the preview used a low-resolution embedded JPEG plan render. The ZMEN polygons were visually shifted/oversized against the dotted no-fill boundary.
known_corrections.result: P2/01 and Z11 geometry now follows visible dotted boundary in page coordinates. ZMEN remains no-fill and TYPE=NAVRH. Preview uses high-resolution 200dpi PDF render asset instead of embedded low-res JPEG.
known_corrections.production_rule: General production extractor must extract ZMEN polygons from dotted boundary topology + text_id assignment, not from RZVP fill color or low-confidence derived candidates.

known_corrections.reason: V6 still used hand-shaped geometry with x=525.5 on Z11, bleeding into ZS/adjacent area. The real no-fill ZMEN boundary is represented in the PDF as repeated black dot marker glyphs, extracted as text glyphs "!"; the polygon must follow those marker centers, not the nearby RZVP fill or guessed rectangle.
known_corrections.result: FID 104 Z11 now follows dot-marker ring x≈466.4..505.3; FID 105 P2/01 now follows dot-marker ring x≈494.5..522.9. HTML preview embeds plan render so the Plan layer is not missing.
known_corrections.production_rule: Detect no-fill change polygons from marker/dot boundary topology plus label assignment. Fill color must not be used for ZMEN.

known_corrections.reason: V7 split Z08/Z10 with a single straight segment ending at the southern Z08 border. The plan shows the shared border as a curved/slanted black dot-marker chain ending at x≈286.1,y≈1262.0, before the southern Z08 boundary continues separately.
known_corrections.result: FID 59/Z10 and FID 60/Z08 now share the dot-marker boundary polyline. Matching no-fill ZMEN.Z features FID 97/98 use the same corrected boundary candidate geometry.
known_corrections.production_rule: When visible dot markers are available, split/dissolve by dot-boundary topology rather than by fill color or by a guessed straight line.

known_corrections.reason: The SV stable area directly below the reviewed P2/01 and Z11 NAVRH polygons was visible in the plan but had no generated RZVP.SV STAV feature. This is a coverage residual: eligible vector definition existed, generated polygon was missing.
known_corrections.result: Added RZVP.SV STAV polygon for the visible gap below FID 70/71. It is marked confidence=medium and must be production-extracted by source-vector coverage residuals, not manual patching.
known_corrections.production_rule: For each LAYER/CLASS/TYPE, compute source candidate coverage and generated polygon union; missing residuals above tolerance fail validation.

qa_rule: Validation layer supports both STAV and NAVRH. NAVRH uses hatch; STAV uses soft tint/dot pattern. UI includes IS_CLOSED filter and selected-feature yellow long dashed border.

geometry_validity_fixes.reason: Too few points in geometry component[897.98 146.735]
